description.ko: AQUA-5 장치가 숨겨진 생체 발광 생태계와 고대 지질 구조를 탐사하는 바다의 가장 깊고 어두운 곳으로 떠나는 몰입형 여정입니다.
description.en: An immersive journey into the darkest depths of the ocean, where the AQUA-5 unit explores hidden bioluminescent ecosystems and ancient geological formations.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of the AQUA-5 deep-sea research vessel navigating through a dark abyssal trench, illuminated by brilliant bioluminescent flora and glowing jellyfish, high-tech exterior with sapphire LED highlights, hydrothermal vents emitting volcanic smoke in the background, ultra-realistic textures, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, deep navy and neon teal color palette.
